scripts.build: npm run -w @torrify/shared-types build && npm run -w @torrify/geometry-engine build && npm run -w @torrify/web build
scripts.examples:prepare: npm run -w @torrify/shared-types build && npm run -w @torrify/geometry-engine build
scripts.examples:all: npm run examples:prepare && node scripts/generate-readme-examples.mjs && node scripts/generate-shape-gallery.mjs
scripts.dev: npm run -w @torrify/shared-types build && npm run -w @torrify/geometry-engine build && npm run -w @torrify/web dev
scripts.lint: npm run -w @torrify/shared-types build && npm run -w @torrify/geometry-engine build && npm run --ws lint
scripts.typecheck: npm run -w @torrify/shared-types build && npm run -w @torrify/geometry-engine build && npm run --ws typecheck
